steps.title: Identify the data point the question requests
steps.content: The question specifies a precise lookup: Mexico's copper mining in 1995. This uniquely identifies one cell in the table to read.

steps.title: Read the value and match to the choices
steps.content:
Reading the table, Mexico's 1995 value is 0.33 million metric tons. The other three options show 1995 values from different countries (United States, China, Poland) and do not correspond to Mexico.

That is the correct answer.
